since_last: 50% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.54%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.18% · Gold -2.53% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 50% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.54%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +5.30%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +5.30%, MU +3.67%, ARM +3.25%, MRVL +2.14%, VRT +1.89%. Laggards: PLTR -2.19%, SPCX -1.97%, WDAY -1.82%, NOW -1.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.97% at $153.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
